titleStmt.title: SII 26.522: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 522. (A.R. No. 495 of 1909.) ŚŌḺAPURAM, SIVAGANGA TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: The end portion of the inscription is missing.

It records the gift of 8(1/2) achchu of money, 7(1/2) achchu for a nandā lamp and 1 achchu for a sandhi lamp, to be burnt in the temple of Uttamaśōḻaviṇṇagar-emperumāṉ of Āṇmā-nāḍu by a certain Nārāyaṇaṉananantanārāyaṇa-bhaṭṭaṉ of Tirunallūr in Uttamaśōḻach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a Tiruviḍaiyāṭṭa-Brahmadēyam of the god. It is stated that the money was received by Pāṇḍavadūtaṉ Iyādavaṉ alias Aḻagiyamaṇavāḷa-baṭṭaṉ, the tiruvaḍippiḍi of the god, and Nārāyaṇaṉ Vīṟṟirundāṉ-bhaṭṭaṉ who had agreed to burn the lamps for ever.

The inscription written in continuation of the above, records another gift of one achchu of poṉ for some other presents to the temple made by the same donor. But the end portion being not traceable, the details are lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . komāṟaparmmarāṉa tribhuvaṉacakravattikaḷ śrīvikramapāṇḍyadevaṟku
varuṣam 5 vatiṉ Etirāmāṇṭaippaci māsattu mutaṟ tiyati Āṇmānāṭṭu Uttama co
ḻaviṇṇakaremperumāṉ tiruvaṭippiṭikkum pāṇṭavatūtaṉiyātavaṉāṉa
Aḻakiya maṇavāḷapaṭṭaṉum nārāyaṇaṉ viṟṟiruntāṉ bhaṭṭaṉum nāya
ṉār tiruviṭaiyāṭṭa brahmateyam śrīuttamacoḻacaturvedimaṅkalattu tirunallū
r nārāyaṇaṉan=tanārāyaṇabhaṭṭaṉ pakkal nāyaṉāṟku tirunan=tāviḷakkoṉṟu ce
luttuvomākak kaikkoṇṭa Accu Eḻaraiyum sandhyādipamoṉṟu
kku koṇṭa Accu Oṉṟumāka Accu 8(1/2) Ivvacceṭṭaraiyuṅ kaikkoṇ
ṭu Innāḷ mutal(c)candrādityavaṟ polivūṭṭākac celuttuvomā
ṉamaikku Ivai pāṇṭavatūtaṉiyātavaṉāṉa Aḻakiya maṇavāḷabhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu § Ivai
nārāyaṇaṉ viṟṟiruntāṉ bhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu § Ivvāṭṭai Ittiyati Innāyaṉā
r cipaṇṭārarkaḷom Ittirunantāviḷakku nārāyaṇaṉṉan=tanārāyaṇabhaṭṭaṉ pakkal I
n=tāyaṉāṟku Ivviḷakku muṉṟum Ikkoyiṟ tevarkaṉmikaḷ Amutu ceyvippomā
ka kaikkoṇṭu Innāyaṉār muñ ceytu cāttiṉa
poṉṉiṉālaccu 1 Ivvaccu Oṉṟukkuñ candrādityavaṟ cipaṇṭārattile Oru teṅkāy muIncomplete.
Digital edition of SII 26.522 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
